name: loklm-wizard-frontend
description: HTML + CSS + i18n + renderer for the LokLM installer wizard ( loaded by ../src-tauri via WebView2 ). The type:commonjs is here so the vitest project can require() i18n.js as CJS — the file ships as a UMD script tag too , so Tauri's WebView2 loads it via the regular HTML script-src.
